System Update.notes: Update package lists and upgrade all installed packages.
System Update.cmd: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y

Port Kill.notes: Find and kill a process running on a specific port (e.g., 3000).

Database Backup.notes: Dump a specific database to a backup folder.

User Creation.notes: Create a new admin user with readWrite roles.

Vite Project.notes: The fastest way to initialize a modern React app.

Tailwind Install.notes: Initialize Tailwind CSS in an existing React project.
Tailwind Install.cmd:
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
npx tailwindcss init -p
